cannot_assert: The decorative halo does not encode density, uncertainty, abundance, or any measured variable.
confirmed: The halo layer is decorative and the cell points retain the same Seurat UMAP coordinates and cell_type mapping.
interpretable: Cluster identities and the decorative-halo disclaimer are readable against the dark background.
recommendation: Keep as a presentation-oriented companion; use the clean light view for print-critical use.
visible: All labels and points remain visible; no subtitle or panel edge is clipped.
